channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-20 21:39 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: I have the sneaking suspicions we all actually have to work has hard as possible to prevent a very s...
item.description: I have the sneaking suspicions we all actually have to work has hard as possible to prevent a very small group of people from intentionally destroying civilization

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 "write an academic paper on general relativity" It produced a 5-page LaTeX paper: >Einstein...
item.description: Grok 4.3 "write an academic paper on general relativity" It produced a 5-page LaTeX paper: >Einstein field equations >Schwarzschild metric >tensor notation and Christoffel symbols >starlight deflection diagram >Newtonian vs GR comparison table >8 properly formatted citations >author: "Grok" xAI team cooked fr

item.title: @elonmusk: A majority of CDLs were issued illegally in New York
item.description: A majority of CDLs were issued illegally in New York

item.title: @elonmusk: But we will never know what their true intentions are.
item.description: But we will never know what their true intentions are.

item.title: @elonmusk: You can now create and share your own Grok Imagine templates with your followers. Give my “Nikita Bo...
item.description: You can now create and share your own Grok Imagine templates with your followers. Give my “Nikita Boar” template a try, now live. Inspired by BoneGPT 👇

item.title: @elonmusk: The whole point about free speech is the right to insult. The second you insist social norms are obs...
item.description: The whole point about free speech is the right to insult. The second you insist social norms are observed, free speech dies.@Nigel_Faragedoes not understand this. Neither does he understand that without@X, there would be no@reformparty_ukor British right wing. We would have been cancelled. Keep insulting!

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚀 GROK APP JUST HIT AN ALL-TIME HIGH! 📈 Total sessions hit their highest point ever nearing 300 mill...
item.description: 🚀 GROK APP JUST HIT AN ALL-TIME HIGH! 📈 Total sessions hit their highest point ever nearing 300 million last month on the AppStore 🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine just got a HUGE update You can now create your own custom templates Just upload your im...
item.description: Grok Imagine just got a HUGE update You can now create your own custom templates Just upload your image and you can do: → Photo to Video → Photo to Style Edit → Photo → Edit → Video No design skills needed This is your own personal AI creative studio Create nearly unlimited templates with full control over your workflow and style

item.title: @elonmusk: I worked as a fund raiser for several top NGOs Its all fake Lies, tricks, and legal loopholes to get...
item.description: I worked as a fund raiser for several top NGOs Its all fake Lies, tricks, and legal loopholes to get money for nothing. We used to call it "cold selling hope"

item.title: @elonmusk: Australians are becoming an endangered species
item.description: Australians are becoming an endangered species

item.title: @elonmusk: Worth double-checking charitable giving to make sure it actually helps the cause you care about
item.description: Worth double-checking charitable giving to make sure it actually helps the cause you care about

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 beta’s front-end capabilities are totally insane I just put only this prompt: “design a web...
item.description: Grok 4.3 beta’s front-end capabilities are totally insane I just put only this prompt: “design a website for kids toys” It generated a super clean UI that actually looks premium and very interesting
